data.title: KAITO briefly broke through 1.98 USDT, with a market value of US$352 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that KAITO briefly broke through 1.98 USDT, with a 4-hour increase of nearly 20%. It has now fallen back to 1.87 USDT, and its market value is temporarily reported at 352 million US dollars.

data.title: Nano Labs: Plans to raise $5.9 million through private equity transactions and increase Bitcoin holdings to 400
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Nano Labs announced that it has signed a share subscription agreement with certain investors to sell 913,714 shares of the company's Class A common stock in a private placement. The purchase price of each Class A common stock is $6.46, and the total purchase price of the private placement is approximately $5.9 million. In addition, Nano Labs also stated that it has recently increased its holdings of Bitcoin. As of February 21, 2025, it holds a total of approximately 400 Bitcoins, with a current value of approximately $40 million, and an average acquisition cost of approximately $99,500, including transaction fees. (PRnewsWire)

data.title: Encrypted privacy data layer Primus completes $6.5 million in Pre-Seed and Seed rounds of financing, led by VanEck and others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The encrypted privacy data layer Primus officially announced on the X platform that it has completed a total of US$6.5 million in Pre-Seed and Seed rounds of financing. This round of financing was led by Dispersion Capital, Symbolic Capital, and VanEck, and participated by Samsung Next, Alchemy, Maelstrom, etc. As the missing encryption middle layer between blockchain and applications, Primus will use cryptography technology to solve the core challenges of trust and privacy in the future, ensuring that the interaction in the decentralized ecosystem is safe and reliable. In addition, it will continue to develop zkTLS and zkFHE, allowing users to verify and control any Web data.

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Users in five regions including China are temporarily unable to participate in claims distribution
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, a representative of FTX creditors, posted on the X platform that a large number of bankruptcy complaints came from jurisdictions that were not eligible for FTX distribution, including Russia, China, Egypt, Nigeria, and Ukraine. Among them, the number of Chinese users was the largest, accounting for 8% of the total number of FTX users. FTX is reviewing relevant solutions.

data.title: BNX briefly broke through 1.2 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 26.76%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that, possibly affected by the token name change, BNX briefly broke through 1.2 USDT and is now trading at 1.12 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 26.76%.
